theme: Rhodes — Where history sails with luxury

linkedin.text:
Imagine telling your team: "Tomorrow, we sail."

30 executives on a private catamaran along the coast of Rhodes. Medieval fortress on one side. Turquoise Mediterranean on the other. Champagne in hand. Zero cell service.

That's not a vacation. That's strategy.

When people disconnect from screens and reconnect with each other, something shifts. Conversations go deeper. Ideas flow faster. Trust builds naturally.

Our Rhodes program:
→ Day 1: Old Town walking tour + rooftop welcome dinner
→ Day 2: Private catamaran cruise + beach lunch + wine tasting
→ Day 3: Team challenge at ancient Lindos + farewell gala

Rhodes isn't on every company's radar. That's exactly why it works — it feels exclusive, surprising, and earned.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Rhodes #Greece #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #Mediterranean #UproductionEvents #LuxuryTravel
